hero.question: Magic vs. Celtics
hero.prob_take:
An 83.5% Celtics win probability on the road in Orlando is essentially pricing them as a 5-point favorite, which feels about 2-3 points too generous given Boston's injury report and the Magic's elite defense at home.

The +32.5 point move in 24 hours screams late money piling into the favorite, but sharp bettors know this is exactly when road chalk gets overvalued in the playoffs.

daily_take.headline: Celtics Blowout Odds Just Became a Fade Signal
daily_take.deck: Magic-Celtics jumped 32.5 points to 83.5% in 24 hours on what looks like single-game noise and momentum chasing. Boston is good, but not "this good against Orlando in a playoff series" good. Smart money doesn't chase 32-point swings on $506K volume. If you didn't own Celtics at 51%, you shouldn't buy them at 83.5%.
